name: 功德木鱼
short_description: An electronic wooden fish with customizable statements and a chanting simulator, making your mood calm and peaceful.
detailed_description:
Electronic wooden fish can represent a desire for life.
It can be tapped while working, placed there while studying, or hung while playing other games.
While running this executable file, one can expect it to actually be implemented.
For the wish to come true, please keep hitting it.
Custom statements can be entered, and the length of the statement has no word limit . For example, you can input:
I hope my roommate's snoring can be cured this year.
I hope my family is in good health.
I hope my roommate is a reasonable person.
I hope my mother recovers soon.
I hope she/he is still happy.
I hope XX will gradually fall in love with me.
I hope to pass the exam.
I hope to be in good healt
